subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the beloved ones! Praise be to God that ye are a shining lamp in the sanctuary of Israel and in the school of His Holiness Abraham [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع احباء الحمد لله در شبستان اسراایل شمعی روشنید و در دبستان حضرت ابراهیم
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @praise and encouragement
